name: Network Infrastructure
description: Routers, switches, firewalls, load balancers, wireless, SD-WAN, and Meraki — interface health, routing, and traffic.
quickTip: Configure syslog from network devices to Splunk. Install Splunk Add-on for Cisco or vendor-specific TA.

subcategories.name: Routers & Switches
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco Networks Add-on for Splunk (`TA-cisco_ios`, Splunkbase 1352), Splunk Add-on for Juniper (`Splunk_TA_juniper`, Splunkbase 2847), Arista EOS syslog (`arista:eos` via SC4S), HPE Aruba CX syslog, SNMP Modular Input — Free

subcategories.name: Firewalls
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Palo Alto Networks Add-on for Splunk (`Splunk_TA_paloalto`, Splunkbase 7523), Fortinet FortiGate Add-On for Splunk (`TA-fortinet_fortigate`, Splunkbase 2846), Splunk Add-on for Juniper (`Splunk_TA_juniper`, Splunkbase 2847) for SRX Series — Free

subcategories.name: Load Balancers & ADCs
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for F5 BIG-IP (`Splunk_TA_f5-bigip`), Citrix ADC TA — Free

subcategories.name: Wireless Infrastructure
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Cisco Meraki, Cisco WLC syslog, Aruba Networks Add-on for Splunk (Splunkbase 4668), HPE Aruba ClearPass App for Splunk (Splunkbase 7865) — Free

subcategories.name: SD-WAN
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco SD-WAN TA (vManage API), Fortinet FortiGate Add-On (`TA-fortinet_fortigate`, SD-WAN events), Aruba EdgeConnect SD-WAN syslog, Cato Networks Events App (Splunkbase 8037), vendor-specific integrations

subcategories.name: DNS & DHCP
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Infoblox, Windows DNS/DHCP, BIND syslog — Free

subcategories.name: Network Flow Data
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk App for Stream, Splunk Add-on for NetFlow — Free

subcategories.name: Network Management Platforms
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco DNA Center TA, Meraki TA, syslog/SNMP trap receivers

subcategories.name: Cisco ThousandEyes
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco ThousandEyes App for Splunk (Splunkbase 7719) — Cisco Supported

subcategories.name: gNMI / gRPC Streaming Telemetry
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Telegraf with `inputs.gnmi` plugin → Splunk HEC (`splunkmetric` format), Arista CloudVision Telemetry Extension, Nokia gNMIc collector. No native Splunkbase gNMI add-on exists; Telegraf is the documented collector pattern (see [Splunk Lantern: Monitoring Cisco network devices using gRPC](https://lantern.splunk.com/Platform_Data_Management/Unlock_Insights/Monitoring_Cisco_network_devices_using_gRPC)).
subcategories.dataSources: Metrics index via HEC (`sourcetype=telegraf:gnmi`, `sourcetype=telegraf:cisco_telemetry_mdt`). gNMI subscriptions use OpenConfig YANG or vendor-native YANG paths. Three subscription modes: `SAMPLE` (periodic), `ON_CHANGE` (event-driven), `TARGET_DEFINED` (device decides).

subcategories.name: Telecommunications & CDR Analytics
subcategories.primaryAppTa: SBC/softswitch CDR feeds, IMS core TAs, `Cisco CDR` / `asterisk:cdr`, Splunk App for Stream (`stream:sip`).

subcategories.name: Cisco Catalyst Center
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco Catalyst Add-on for Splunk (`TA_cisco_catalyst`, Splunkbase 7538) — Cisco Supported
subcategories.dataSources: Catalyst Center Intent API via TA modular inputs (`cisco:dnac:devicehealth`, `cisco:dnac:clienthealth`, `cisco:dnac:networkhealth`, `cisco:dnac:issue`, `cisco:dnac:compliance`, `cisco:dnac:securityadvisory`, `cisco:dnac:device`, `cisco:dnac:sitehealth`, `cisco:dnac:interfacehealth`, `cisco:dnac:fabricsite`, `cisco:dnac:swim`, `cisco:dnac:wireless:rf`), Catalyst Center Platform event notifications via HEC webhook (`cisco:dnac:event:notification`), cross-product correlation with ISE, SD-WAN, Meraki, ThousandEyes, and Cyber Vision data

subcategories.name: HTTP Proxies
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Squid Proxy, Blue Coat ProxySG TA, Zscaler TA — vendor syslog integrations

subcategories.name: Infoblox Advanced Monitoring
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Splunk Add-on for Infoblox (`Splunk_TA_infoblox`, Splunkbase 2934)

subcategories.name: WAN Optimization & Acceleration
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Riverbed SteelHead syslog/SNMP, Aruba EdgeConnect / Silver Peak syslog, Citrix SD-WAN WANOP, Zscaler Digital Experience

subcategories.name: Network Packet Brokers & Visibility Fabric
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Gigamon GigaVUE syslog/SNMP, Keysight/Ixia Vision syslog, cPacket cStor, APCON, Garland Technology TAP health via SNMP

subcategories.name: MPLS & Service Provider WAN Transport
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco Networks Add-on for Splunk (`TA-cisco_ios`), Splunk Add-on for Juniper (`Splunk_TA_juniper`) — MPLS syslog from IOS/IOS-XE/IOS-XR and Junos PE routers

subcategories.name: Network Automation & Orchestration Monitoring
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Ansible AWX/Tower webhook or syslog to HEC, NETCONF/RESTCONF session logs via device syslog, Terraform audit logs

subcategories.name: IPv6 Operations & Transition
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco Networks Add-on for Splunk (`TA-cisco_ios`), Palo Alto Networks Add-on (`Splunk_TA_paloalto`), Splunk Add-on for Juniper (`Splunk_TA_juniper`), Splunk Add-on for NetFlow, Zeek/Corelight TA — IPv6 syslog from routers/switches/firewalls, NetFlow v9/IPFIX with IPv6 templates, Zeek ICMPv6/NDP analysis

subcategories.name: Network Time Services
subcategories.primaryAppTa: Cisco Networks Add-on for Splunk (`TA-cisco_ios`), SC4SNMP for NTP/PTP MIB polling, vendor syslog from routers and switches
